chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 498 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.1190/2023 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.1191/2023 (C/A) 13.06.2023 None present for the petitioner Mr. Abdul Qadir Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents No.2&3 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< A statement has been filed, which reflects that an amount of Rs.2,45,000/- has been paid by the Municipal Committee, Rohri to the petitioner, whereas, the remaining amount of Rs.63,694/- will be paid according to the schedule submitted by leaned counsel for respondents No.2&3, which is taken on record. The listed applications stand disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
